title: THE CHAIN OF LEGEND
description: A legendary blade made from chains.. For the legendary man himself, chainingguy123...
body:
# THE CHAIN OF LEGEND

![the sword being held](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa8a2b25f95396c2041fdcd9d609c0bbb713ae40.png)

**Behold, the legendary weapon crafted after the image of the man himself, chainingguy123.**

**Also this was for an ItsJim video.**

**But about that sword, it's very chaining.**

![using the sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07ad5819af9fa6f7c55a66997a30d6323dd418ee_0.webp)

**You can hold down right click to charge the blade up.. After around 4 seconds, you'll hear a ding, and well.. just release to see what happens.**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![the weapon being USED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de6543b4e4b0a554f7f4af116394df9f4ebf68de.png)

</details>

**Here is how to craft it:**

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f613da3b734f50195e26f63a4b23d87852c0f92a.png)


--------

**This mod also adds a new food item.**

 - **Whatever Exile Is On, Because I Need It**

   - Gives Resistance III when eaten.
